1.q: High affinity of Vc-NhaD for Na+ ions (Fig. 3C) makes this ion transporter an efficient scavenger of intracellular sodium.
These results strongly suggest that NhaA is an Na+/H+ antiporter contributing to the Na+/H+ homeostasis of V. cholerae.

2.q: We showed that both Vc-NhaA and Vc-NhaB confer Na+ resistance and that Vc-NhaA displays an antiport activity in E. coli
